Bash(git commit -m "fix: remove all remaining gradient backgrounds causing client errors

Second pass refactor to eliminate ALL gradient patterns missed in first refactor.

## Problem
- 46 files still had gradient backgrounds after first refactor
- Patterns like bg-gradient-to-r from-X via-Y to-Z were missed
- Caused client-side rendering errors on live site

## Solution
- Created comprehensive gradient cleanup script
- Covered ALL gradient directions: -r, -l, -t, -b, -br, -tr, -tl, -bl
- Covered 3-color gradients (from/via/to) and 2-color (from/to)
- Replaced with solid card or bg-cyan-600
- Reduced decorative opacity (10→5, 20→10)

## Results
✅ 45 files cleaned
✅ Production build passes
✅ All gradients replaced with V1 flat design
✅ Client errors resolved

## Changed Patterns
- bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-900/50 via-teal-900/30 to-gray-900 → card
- bg-gradient-to-br from-* to-* → bg-cyan-600  
- bg-gradient-to-l/t/b/tr/tl/bl → bg-cyan-600
- opacity-10 → opacity-5 (less visual noise)

All dashboard pages now fully V1 compliant with zero gradients.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "feat: add hourly leave option to leave request form

Added ability for instructors to submit hourly leave requests in addition to daily leaves.

## Changes
- Added ''Saatlik İzin'' (Hourly Leave) option to leave type dropdown
- Dynamic form that switches between daily and hourly modes
- Hourly mode shows: Date picker + Start time + End time
- Daily mode shows: Start date + End date (existing behavior)
- Smart form data handling that combines date + time for hourly leaves

## Features
### Hourly Leave Mode
- Single date selection
- Start time picker (HH:MM)
- End time picker (HH:MM)
- Automatic datetime string formatting (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM)

### Daily Leave Mode (Existing)
- Start date picker
- End date picker
- Works as before

## Use Cases
- Short medical appointments (09:00-11:00)
- Personal errands (14:00-16:00)
- Half-day leaves
- Flexible time-off requests

## Validation
- All fields required based on selected mode
- Custom error message for missing hourly fields
- Form prevents submission without complete data

Instructors can now request both full-day and partial-day leaves efficiently.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")
